'''âj-n-ng''' ('''kajanang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quasiquote|quasiquote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quasiquote|quasiquote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajanang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijanang|thijanang]] || [[word:jijanang|jijanang]] || [[word:shijanang|shijanang]] || [[word:kijanang|kijanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujanang|thuthujanang]] || [[word:jujujanang|jujujanang]] || [[word:shushujanang|shushujanang]] || [[word:kukujanang|kukujanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujanang|thujanang]] || [[word:jujanang|jujanang]] || [[word:shujanang|shujanang]] || [[word:kujanang|kujanang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujanang|thujanang]] || [[word:jujanang|jujanang]] || [[word:shujanang|shujanang]] || [[word:kujanang|kujanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejanang|thejanang]] || [[word:jejanang|jejanang]] || [[word:shejanang|shejanang]] || [[word:kejanang|kejanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojanang|thothojanang]] || [[word:jojojanang|jojojanang]] || [[word:shoshojanang|shoshojanang]] || [[word:kokojanang|kokojanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojanang|thojanang]] || [[word:jojanang|jojanang]] || [[word:shojanang|shojanang]] || [[word:kojanang|kojanang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojanang|thojanang]] || [[word:jojanang|jojanang]] || [[word:shojanang|shojanang]] || [[word:kojanang|kojanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjanang|thĂŠjanang]] || [[word:jĂŠjanang|jĂŠjanang]] || [[word:shĂŠjanang|shĂŠjanang]] || [[word:kĂŠjanang|kĂŠjanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajanang|thathajanang]] || [[word:jajajanang|jajajanang]] || [[word:shashajanang|shashajanang]] || [[word:kakajanang|kakajanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajanang|thajanang]] || [[word:jajanang|jajanang]] || [[word:shajanang|shajanang]] || [[word:kajanang|kajanang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajanang|thajanang]] || [[word:jajanang|jajanang]] || [[word:shajanang|shajanang]] || [[word:kajanang|kajanang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajanang|shajanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajanang|goshajanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajanang|gokishajanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajanangnĂŒ|shajanangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajanangnknĂŒ|goshajanangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajanangnĂŒ|gokishajanangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajanangshĂ«|shajanangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajanangnkshĂ«|goshajanangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajanangshĂ«|gokishajanangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajanangro|shajanangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajanangnkro|goshajanangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajanangro|gokishajanangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajanangmu|shajanangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajanangnkmu|goshajanangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajanangmu|gokishajanangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajanangsher|shajanangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajanangnksher|goshajanangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajanangsher|gokishajanangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajanang|shajanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajanangnkng|goshajanangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajanang|gokishajanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajanangya|shajanangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajanangnkya|goshajanangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajanangya|gokishajanangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajanangyam|shajanangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajanangnkyam|goshajanangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajanangyam|gokishajanangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajanangnĂŒshĂ«|shajanangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajanangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajanangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajanangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajanangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajanangnĂŒro|shajanangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajanangnknĂŒro|goshajanangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajanangnĂŒro|gokishajanangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajanangnĂŒmu|shajanangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajanangnknĂŒmu|goshajanangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajanangnĂŒmu|gokishajanangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajanangshĂ«nĂŒ|shajanangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajanangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajanangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajanangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajanangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajanangshĂ«ro|shajanangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajanangnkshĂ«ro|goshajanangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajanangshĂ«ro|gokishajanangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajanangshĂ«mu|shajanangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajanangnkshĂ«mu|goshajanangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajanangshĂ«mu|gokishajanangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajanangronĂŒ|shajanangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajanangnkronĂŒ|goshajanangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajanangronĂŒ|gokishajanangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajanangroshĂ«|shajanangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajanangnkroshĂ«|goshajanangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajanangroshĂ«|gokishajanangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajanangromu|shajanangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajanangnkromu|goshajanangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajanangromu|gokishajanangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajanangmunĂŒ|shajanangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajanangnkmunĂŒ|goshajanangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajanangmunĂŒ|gokishajanangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajanangmushĂ«|shajanangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajanangnkmushĂ«|goshajanangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajanangmushĂ«|gokishajanangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajanangmuro|shajanangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajanangnkmuro|goshajanangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajanangmuro|gokishajanangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
